case_title: OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS vs. WILLIAMS, CARRIE M.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RANDY OSBORNE FILED RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-28-1993, CONTINUED TO APR-29-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARRIE M. $1,166.44 PRINCIPAL, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $332.46 INTEREST, $111.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,960.40
CASE TERMINATED: 21-APR-93 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARRIE M. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-28-1993
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS SERVED NOV-02-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARRIE M.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $111.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARRIE M.
